title: Distrike Open Source Strategy Selection
target: Determine the optimal open-source licensing strategy for Distrike that maximizes adoption while maintaining competitive moat and sustainable development
constraints: individual developer, not a company with legal team
must attract users to build initial adoption
must protect core competitive advantage (MFT engine, rule database, Agent API)
must be compatible with existing Go open-source ecosystem
must not create unsustainable maintenance burden (dual codebase)
competitors gdu/dust are fully open-source MIT/Apache
